headline: Realty Income & Apollo Set to Form a Strategic Partnership
summary: O to secure $1B from Apollo for a 49% stake in joint venture owning a portfolio of U.S. single-tenant retail properties.

headline: Realty Income: Graham Number And P/E Suggest Buy
summary: Realty Income faces headwinds from higher borrowing costs but may be undervalued vs. Graham benchmarks with a 7.1% AFFO yield. Click for this O stock update.

headline: Realty Income Apollo Venture Reshapes Funding Mix And Growth Path
summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) has formed a $1 billion private capital joint venture with Apollo focused on stabilized, single-tenant retail properties. The venture includes long-term management rights for Realty Income and call options on the portfolio, aligning interests over an extended period. The structure is intended to diversify Realty Income's capital sources beyond public markets and support future investment activity. Realty Income, trading at $62.64, is moving ahead with this private...

headline: Yield Of Dreams: A High-Yield Dividend Retirement Portfolio Without The Nightmares
summary: When building a portfolio to live off dividends in retirement, chasing yields seldom works. Discover the essential 'two qualifiers' for your retirement goals.
